intended_use: CuraRad-ICH is a software workflow tool designed to aid in prioritizing the clinical assessment of adult non-contrast head CT cases with features suggestive of acute intracranial hemorrhage. CuraRad-I
intended_use_full: CuraRad-ICH is a software workflow tool designed to aid in prioritizing the clinical assessment of adult non-contrast head CT cases with features suggestive of acute intracranial hemorrhage. CuraRad-ICH analyzes cases using deep learning algorithms to identify suspected ICH findings. It makes case-level output available to a PACS/workstation for worklist prioritization or triage.
ground_truth: Ground truth provided by experienced radiologists
other_metrics: Processing time: 43 seconds average (95% CI: 39-46 seconds), median 33 seconds, standard deviation 32 seconds, minimum 16 seconds, maximum 301 seconds. Stratified analyses by slice thickness, detector rows, and scanner manufacturer showed no statistically significant differences.
